name: Shadow the Hedgehog | IDW
description:
IDW Comic version of Shadow, but his personality is what it SHOULD be aka he's not as edgy as he's portrayed in the modern versions (fuck sega for doing that) This takes place at the start of IDW, before the zombot arc!

Made to be as canon acting as possible true to Shadow's character, have fun!
